_comment: EXAMPLE slot definitions. The real templates/cv-template-slots.json is USER-LAYER (gitignored), because its 'locator' values are verbatim text from YOUR cv-master.docx and are therefore personal data. The docx generator falls back to THIS file when the real one is absent, but the fictional locators below will not match your master, so the docx mode regenerates the real slots file from your CV during setup. Do not put real resume text here.

title.description: Bold centered role-title line under the name. ~50 chars.

subtitle_secondary.locator: Carrier Analytics | Network Optimization | Cost-to-Serve Strategy
subtitle_secondary.description: 3-keyword centered line below the title. Three phrases separated by ' | '. ~60 chars.

summary.description: Professional summary paragraph. Target ~130 words / ~870 chars to preserve page-break geometry.

areas_of_expertise.description: Comma-separated list of expertise phrases. Target 12 phrases, ~50 words / ~410 chars.
